title: Media, Connectors, Transceivers, and Architectures
description: Select and document a campus and data-center physical design under distance, bandwidth, environment, and redundancy constraints. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a physical media and topology bill of design while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Select copper, fiber, wireless, cellular, satellite, and transceivers from measurable constraints.
Match connectors, form factors, standards, and polarity correctly.
Choose topologies and traffic architectures from failure domains and flow patterns.
